shop_bio: Ailema Studio — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: We rescue discarded materials and give them a second life as functional art.
title_story: Turning waste into wonder, one stitch at a time.
story_text: Ailema Studio was born in a small Hanoi apartment in 2018 when founder Linh Nguyen began transforming fabric offcuts from local tailors into bags and home accessories. What started as a weekend experiment became a full studio employing twelve artisans, committed to the belief that beautiful objects should leave no trace behind.
seller_background: Founded 2018 · Hanoi · 12 artisans · Zero-waste certified

shop_bio: Bite District — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Every piece tells the story of our village and its centuries-old craft tradition.
title_story: Village flavours, handcrafted with centuries of tradition.
story_text: Deep in Quang Nam province, Bite District preserves the ceramic and lacquerware techniques passed down through six generations of the Tran family. Every product carries the fingerprints of the craftsperson who made it — intentionally, proudly, permanently.
seller_background: Founded 2015 · Quang Nam · Family workshop · Heritage craft

shop_bio: Fluora — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: We rescue discarded materials and give them a second life as functional art.
title_story: Botanicals preserved in resin, beauty that never fades.
story_text: Fluora began as a hobby on a kitchen table in Đà Lạt, pressing wildflowers into resin jewellery. The crisp mountain air, the abundance of blooms, and a passion for slow-making shaped a brand that now ships pressed-flora art to thirty countries. Each piece contains real flowers foraged within fifty kilometres of the studio.
seller_background: Founded 2019 · Đà Lạt · 7 artisans · Botanicals specialist

shop_bio: Kalisse — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Committed to zero-waste production and biodegradable packaging on every order.
title_story: Minimal form, maximal purpose — rattan reimagined.
story_text: Kalisse works exclusively with rattan harvested from certified forests in the Mekong Delta. Co-founder An Phan spent two years studying traditional basket-weaving before stripping it back to its cleanest, most functional forms. The result is furniture and homewares that age beautifully and biodegrade completely.
seller_background: Founded 2017 · Cần Thơ · 18 artisans · FSC-certified rattan

shop_bio: Kiwi — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Committed to zero-waste production and biodegradable packaging on every order.
title_story: Playful ceramics made for everyday delight.
story_text: Kiwi Studio operates from a converted warehouse on the outskirts of Hội An, where a team of young ceramicists blend traditional Gốm Chu Đậu glazing techniques with irreverent, contemporary shapes. Nothing is too precious to use every day — that is the whole point.
seller_background: Founded 2020 · Hội An · 9 artisans · Contemporary ceramics

shop_bio: Lumiere — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: We rescue discarded materials and give them a second life as functional art.
title_story: Handblown glass that holds light like nothing else.
story_text: Lumiere was founded by a glassblower trained in Murano who returned home to Huế determined to fuse Italian technique with Vietnamese sensibility. The studio's signature cobalt-and-amber palette draws from the ancient imperial tiles of the Nguyễn dynasty. Every piece is signed and numbered.
seller_background: Founded 2016 · Huế · 6 artisans · Handblown glass studio

shop_bio: Lumina — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: A third-generation workshop preserving heritage techniques passed down through our family.
title_story: Three generations of silk — woven into every thread.
story_text: Lumina is the third chapter of the Bùi family weaving legacy, stretching back to 1952 in Vạn Phúc silk village. Where previous generations sold to local markets, Lumina brings hand-woven silk scarves and cushions to a global audience without changing a single step in the production process.
seller_background: Founded 2014 · Hà Đông · Family workshop · Heritage silk weaving

shop_bio: Magic Hands — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: A third-generation workshop preserving heritage techniques passed down through our family.
title_story: Every knot is a story told in macramé and love.
story_text: Magic Hands is a cooperative of seventeen mothers in Bình Dương who learned macramé through a community upskilling programme in 2021. What began as supplementary income became their primary livelihood and a deeply shared creative practice. Orders directly fund school fees for the artisans' children.
seller_background: Founded 2021 · Bình Dương · 17-member cooperative · Fair trade

shop_bio: Nomi — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: A third-generation workshop preserving heritage techniques passed down through our family.
title_story: Scent memories crafted from Vietnam's wild heartland.
story_text: Nomi distils essential oils from plants grown on its own farm in the Kon Tum highlands — lemongrass, patchouli, vetiver, wild ginger. The candles, diffusers, and soaps that result are dense with place, carrying the humidity and greenness of the central highlands into homes around the world.
seller_background: Founded 2018 · Kon Tum · Farm-to-product distillery · 8 artisans

shop_bio: Paper Lane — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Every piece tells the story of our village and its centuries-old craft tradition.
title_story: Dó paper: an ancient art reborn for the modern desk.
story_text: Paper Lane revives the 700-year-old Dó paper tradition of Bắc Ninh, turning hand-pulped mulberry bark into stationery, lampshades, and art prints. Founder Minh Châu apprenticed for three years under one of the last remaining Dó masters before opening her studio, ensuring every technique was preserved faithfully.
seller_background: Founded 2019 · Bắc Ninh · 5 artisans · Traditional Dó paper

shop_bio: Rolla — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: We rescue discarded materials and give them a second life as functional art.
title_story: Upcycled metal crafted into sculptural everyday objects.
story_text: Rolla rescues scrap copper and brass from industrial workshops in Hồ Chí Minh City, transforming offcuts destined for landfill into vases, trays, and wall art. Lead fabricator Đức Trần trained as an aerospace engineer before pivoting to studio metalwork — the precision shows in every hammered surface.
seller_background: Founded 2020 · HCM City · 4 artisans · Industrial upcycling

shop_bio: Rude Olive — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Every piece tells the story of our village and its centuries-old craft tradition.
title_story: Bold flavours, honest craft — condiments with real character.
story_text: Rude Olive makes small-batch chilli oils, fermented pastes, and vinegars in a Mekong Delta kitchen using only ingredients sourced within 100 km. The name is a nod to the founders' stubbornness: they refused every shortcut, every additive, every compromise. The food speaks for itself.
seller_background: Founded 2022 · Tiền Giang · Micro-batch kitchen · 3 founders

shop_bio: Secret Garden — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: We rescue discarded materials and give them a second life as functional art.
title_story: Pressed botanicals and handmade paper: nature framed.
story_text: Secret Garden operates from a hillside studio near Sapa where founder Hoa Vũ grows, forages, and presses over two hundred plant species. Each framed artwork is a record of a specific season in a specific valley — no two pieces are ever identical. The studio is powered entirely by solar energy.
seller_background: Founded 2017 · Sapa · Solo artisan studio · Solar-powered

shop_bio: Soleil — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Committed to zero-waste production and biodegradable packaging on every order.
title_story: Natural-dye fashion rooted in Mường textile heritage.
story_text: Soleil collaborates directly with Mường ethnic weavers in Hòa Bình, co-designing garments that honour traditional brocade patterns while adapting cuts for contemporary wear. All dyes are extracted from indigo, turmeric, and tannin-rich leaves grown in the weavers' own gardens.
seller_background: Founded 2016 · Hòa Bình · Ethnic craft collaboration · Natural dye

shop_bio: Studio West — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Committed to zero-waste production and biodegradable packaging on every order.
title_story: Concrete and timber — brutalist beauty for the home.
story_text: Studio West was founded by two architects who left practice to make objects at human scale. Their Đà Nẵng workshop produces concrete planters, timber shelving, and cast-iron hooks using construction off-cuts gathered from building sites across the city. Every product listing includes the origin of the material.
seller_background: Founded 2021 · Đà Nẵng · Architect-led studio · 6 craftspeople

shop_bio: Super Blossom — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Committed to zero-waste production and biodegradable packaging on every order.
title_story: Dried floral arrangements that celebrate impermanence.
story_text: Super Blossom harvests and dries flowers from farm collectives across the Lâm Đồng plateau, creating arrangements that age gracefully rather than wilting ungracefully. The studio's philosophy is borrowed from wabi-sabi: beauty found in the transient, the imperfect, and the incomplete.
seller_background: Founded 2020 · Lâm Đồng · Farm collective sourcing · 10 artisans

shop_bio: The Floral Studio — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Every piece tells the story of our village and its centuries-old craft tradition.
title_story: A living studio where every bouquet tells a village story.
story_text: The Floral Studio was founded in Hanoi's Old Quarter by florist Lan Anh after a decade arranging flowers for luxury hotels. She returned to her roots — sourcing only from smallholder flower farmers in the Red River Delta. Each arrangement is seasonal, never repeated, and comes with a card naming the farm it came from.
seller_background: Founded 2018 · Hanoi · Smallholder-sourced florals · 8 artisans

shop_bio: The Good Life — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: We rescue discarded materials and give them a second life as functional art.
title_story: Slow living goods for a quieter, more intentional home.
story_text: The Good Life curates linen, ceramics, and woven baskets from independent artisans across central Vietnam, presenting them as a cohesive collection for mindful homes. Founder Thảo Nguyễn spent years in retail before deciding the supply chain needed to be as beautiful as the products it carried.
seller_background: Founded 2019 · Đà Nẵng · Multi-artisan curator · Slow living

shop_bio: Uspeer — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Founded by a women's cooperative to bring fair income to rural artisans.
title_story: Women-led craft empowering rural communities across Vietnam.
story_text: Uspeer is a cooperative connecting forty rural artisans from three provinces — Nghệ An, Hà Tĩnh, and Quảng Bình — with global buyers. Every order funds the maker's wage and the cooperative's shared childcare centre and skills programme. Fair trade certified since 2020.
seller_background: Founded 2018 · Multi-province · 40-member cooperative · Fair trade

shop_bio: Bluebell — handcrafted goods made sustainably in Vietnam.
craft_story: Committed to zero-waste production and biodegradable packaging on every order.
title_story: Indigo-dyed textiles woven from the heart of the highlands.
story_text: Bluebell works alongside H'Mông artisans in the Hà Giang mountains, combining centuries-old hand-batik indigo technique with contemporary textile design. The deep blue that defines every piece takes three weeks to achieve — seventeen rounds of dyeing, drying, and setting by hand under the open sky.
seller_background: Founded 2016 · Hà Giang · H'Mông craft collaboration · Indigo specialist
